focus_points.label: Health and energy after recent illness.
focus_points.reason: Notes mention recent sickness. Worth exploring how they're feeling now and if any concerns linger about their energy levels or work capacity.

focus_points.label: Current UX priorities and focus areas.
focus_points.reason: Whether they're still on the work that made them senior, or quietly being absorbed into firefighting.

focus_points.label: What Carl would want more of from you.
focus_points.reason: Whether there's something specific Carl needs from you that he hasn't asked for. Leads stop asking when they think you're already stretched.
